introduction: Actuality film from the wedding of Sir Edward Stafford Howard and Lady Howard Stepney in Llanelli featuring a local troop of Scouts. (Synopsis) Guests arriving at church, flanked on both sides by Boy Scouts Guard of Honour. Guests arrives at church door with Boy Scouts in foreground. Repeat of set-up in opening shot with vicar and choirboys, bride, attendants, and bridemaids proceeding to camera. Vicar, bride, attendants, bridesmaids, enter church door. Bride and groom emerge from church door; followed by guests etc; women throng foreground of shot. Wedding train passes Scouts and guests. Men and women standing talking in groups. HA of Scouts marching past camera; as they exit several men and women come into shot and pose for camera; End Title.
